zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Strother於1265年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德吉可紐頓時，他的父親Alan de Strother II12歲，母親Constance de Lymore12歲。他於大約1290年與Joan Corbet在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德吉可紐頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1330年在英國英格蘭享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Strother于1265年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德吉可紐頓时，他的父亲Alan de Strother II12岁，母亲Constance de Lymore12岁。他于大约1290年与Joan Corbet在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德吉可紐頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1330年在英国英格兰享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Strother
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place somewhere in northeastern England formerly called (The) Strother, named with Middle English strother, struther, stroder ‘wooded marshland, marsh covered in brushwood’ (Old English strōther). This topographic term was current in Durham, Northumberland, and southern Scotland, but the place which gave rise to the surname has not been certainly identified. A locality called le strother is recorded near the city of Durham c. 1299, while another, recorded as le estrother in 1153–95, may have named Strother House in Boldon (Durham), unless the house was named from the surname. William de Strother was a tenant in nearby Offerton, in 1473, and he was probably a member of the Newcastle merchant-cum-gentry family from whom all or most modern bearers inherit their surname. In Northumberland, possibilities include Cold Strother in Kirkheaton and Haughton Strother, although there is no evidence for either place being known simply as The Strother. Alternatively, The Strother may have been a lost district name for either the marshy area around Cold Strother (north of the North Tyne) or that around Haughton Strother (on the south bank of the North Tyne), but again evidence is lacking. The (del) Strother family owned estates near (but not in) both places from at least the late 14th century. In southern Scotland, Struther in Lanarkshire and Struthers in Ayrshire and Fife (from the Older Scots equivalent of Middle English strother) might be considered, but for lack of supporting evidence it has been suggested that Scottish Strother is probably the attested Northumberland surname, whose bearers were major landholders on the Scottish border.
History: A William Strother is recorded in VA in 1673, probably the same man who, as William Strouder, was granted land in 1658.

variants.name: Struth
meanings: Scottish: topographic name from Older Scots stroth(e) ‘marshy place’. Compare Strother , Struthers .

variants.name: Struthers
meanings: English and Scottish (Lanarkshire): probably a variant of Strother , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Strother was born in 1265, in Kirknewton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Alan de Strother II, was 12 and his mother, Constance de Lymore, was 12. He married Joan Corbet about 1290, in Kirknewton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1330, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Strother est né en 1265, à Kirknewton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alan de Strother II, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Constance de Lymore, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Joan Corbet environ 1290, à Kirknewton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1330, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Strother 1265 in Kirknewton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan de Strother II 12 und seine Mutter Constance de Lymore 12. Er hat um 1290 in Kirknewton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Joan Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1330 im Alter von 65 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Strother è nato il nel 1265 nel Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Alan de Strother II, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Constance de Lymore, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Joan Corbet circa 1290, nel Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1330, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Strotherが1265年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドキルクニュートンで生まれた時，父Alan de Strother IIは12歳，母Constance de Lymoreは12歳であった。約1290年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドキルクニュートンでJoan Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1330年にイギリスイギリスで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Strother(이)가 1265년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 커뉴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan de Strother II(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de Lymore(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 커뉴턴에서 Joan Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Strother nasceu em 1265, em Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alan de Strother II, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Constance de Lymore, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Corbet aproximadamente 1290, em Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1330, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Strother родился в 1265 г. в местности кирнютон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alan de Strother II было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance de Lymore, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Corbet около 1290 г. в местности кирнютон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1330 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Strother nació en 1265, en Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Alan de Strother II, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Constance de Lymore, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Joan Corbet aproximadamente 1290, en Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1330, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
